title: Well-executed 5-Why analysis reaching systemic root cause at depth 5
code_snippet:
## Root Cause Analysis

1. Why did payment fail? -> Redis connection string was empty in config
2. Why was connection string empty? -> Config file had wrong format after template change
3. Why was wrong format accepted? -> No schema validation in deploy pipeline
4. Why is there no schema validation? -> Pipeline was built before config complexity grew
5. Why wasn't validation added when config grew? -> No process to review pipeline gates as services evolve

Root Cause: Missing process for periodic pipeline capability reviews as services evolve.

Contributing Factors:
- Outdated runbook (delayed recovery by ~10 min)
- No automated rollback trigger on error rate spike
- Alert fatigue: 42 false positives in 24h diluted attention
expected_feedback: No violations. 5-Why analysis correctly reaches depth 5 with systemic root cause (missing process for pipeline reviews). Each level is non-trivial. Root cause is process-level, not individual. Contributing factors are properly separated and specific with evidence. Analysis would prevent recurrence if addressed.
